subcodes.first_line: O Israfil! By the life of God, the trumpet hath verily been sounded, and all who dwell in the heavens and on earth have been thunderstruck, save a few [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسرافیل لعمر الله قد نفخ فی الصور و انصعق من فی السموات و الارض الا عده
subcodes.subjects: @apocalyptic imagery, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
